sentences.text: If the Shgatpa extension is implemented, then for each supported virtual memory scheme SvNN supported in `satp`, the corresponding hgatp SvNNx4 mode must be supported.
sentences.section: Preamble > Shgatpa Extension for Translation Mode Support, Version 1.0

sentences.text: Furthermore, the `hgatp` mode Bare must also be supported.
sentences.section: Preamble > Shgatpa Extension for Translation Mode Support, Version 1.0
